requirements.title: Memory Allocator Interface
requirements.description: The memory module shall define an abstract allocator API with Get, Update, and Put operations.
requirements.rationale: Enables deterministic, pool-based memory management for resource-constrained embedded systems.

requirements.title: Allocator Pointer API Dependency
requirements.description: The memory allocator root shall hold an injected pointer API for internal memory operations.
requirements.rationale: Enables deterministic, pool-based memory management for resource-constrained embedded systems.

requirements.title: Block Allocator Initialization
requirements.description: The block allocator shall initialize from caller-provided backing memory, metadata array, type size, alignment, and length.
requirements.rationale: Enables deterministic, pool-based memory management for resource-constrained embedded systems.

requirements.title: Block Allocator Get
requirements.description: The block allocator shall allocate a block of the configured element size in O(1) time.
requirements.rationale: Enables deterministic, pool-based memory management for resource-constrained embedded systems.

requirements.title: Block Allocator Free Block Reuse
requirements.description: The block allocator shall reuse freed blocks via a LIFO free list when available.
requirements.rationale: Enables deterministic, pool-based memory management for resource-constrained embedded systems.

requirements.title: Block Allocator Put
requirements.description: The block allocator shall free a previously allocated block in O(1) time.
requirements.rationale: Enables deterministic, pool-based memory management for resource-constrained embedded systems.

requirements.title: Block Allocator Double Free Rejection
requirements.description: The block allocator shall reject double frees with an error status.
requirements.rationale: Enables deterministic, pool-based memory management for resource-constrained embedded systems.

requirements.title: Block Allocator Invalid Address Rejection
requirements.description: The block allocator shall reject frees of invalid or misaligned addresses with an error status.
requirements.rationale: Enables deterministic, pool-based memory management for resource-constrained embedded systems.

requirements.title: Block Allocator Update
requirements.description: The block allocator shall adjust a descriptor's size in-place up to the configured element size.
requirements.rationale: Enables deterministic, pool-based memory management for resource-constrained embedded systems.

requirements.title: Block Allocator No Memory Move
requirements.description: The block allocator Update shall not move memory when adjusting descriptor size.
requirements.rationale: Enables deterministic, pool-based memory management for resource-constrained embedded systems.
